PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Cristina Perez-Abelson appeared via zoom for and with Peter Hobart (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of LOST Will and Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The lost will dated December 25, 2021 is admitted to probate. Peter Hobart is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $722,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 11, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Visting Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
